res_hint: Click analyze to get track drag guide
err_select_files: Please select video and audio files first!
err_low_confidence: Auto-align failed: correlation peak too weak (Z-score={0:.2f}, threshold={1:.1f}). The audio in the video and the music file are too different to reliably match.
err_manual_fallback: Tip: Use the 'Manual Offset (ms)' slider on the main Sync page, or try a higher-quality audio source.
hint_video_early: Positive offset: delay the replacement music by {0:.4f} sec.
hint_music_early: Negative offset: trim {0:.4f} sec from the beginning of the replacement music.
hint_perfect: Zero offset: no timing adjustment is required.
msg_analyze_err: Please check if your media files are corrupted.
about_desc: Indie developer & rhythm game enthusiast. This tool helps players easily solve the problem of hand-cam audio syncing.
about_ack1: The app icon is cropped from the 'Tairitsu Duck' emoji series.
about_ack2: Thanks to artist Haruya (Bilibili UID: 3280) and the commissioner for the free open license.
about_ack3: Note: Tairitsu and related IPs are owned by lowiro. This is a free open-source community tool not affiliated with lowiro.
about_warn1: This software is free & open-source. If you paid for this, please request a refund.
about_warn2: For personal use only. Do not use for profit or commercial purposes.
set_copy_desc: Skip re-encoding, keep 100% original quality & export instantly (ignores GPU & Bitrate).
set_gpu_desc: Effective only when [Stream Copy] is OFF. Enable NVIDIA GPU rendering.
set_bitrate_desc: Effective only when [Stream Copy] is OFF.
set_folder_desc: Automatically open the folder after processing is complete.
set_lang_tooltip: Click to switch between 中文 / English UI
set_lang_restart: Please restart the application for the language change to take effect
set_update_auto_desc: Check GitHub Releases in the background after launch; only notify when a new version is available.
set_update_release_desc: Open GitHub Releases to view and download versions manually.
set_diagnostics_copy_desc: Copy version, system, FFmpeg, settings, and recent logs for troubleshooting.
diagnostics_copied_desc: Paste it to the developer when reporting an issue.
update_check_failed_desc: Please try again later or open the release page manually.
update_check_failed_status: Update check failed. Please try again later.
update_latest_desc: Current version {0} is already the latest version.
update_latest_status: Current version {0} is up to date.
update_offline_desc: Checked the bundled manifest for current version {0}. Try again later or open the release page for the latest status.
update_open_release_hint: No direct installer was found, so the release page will be opened for manual download.
update_no_installer: No directly downloadable installer was found for this version.
update_ignored_desc: Startup update checks will not prompt for {0} again.
update_downloading_desc: After the download is verified, RhythmAlign will ask whether to install it.
update_checksum_failed: Installer SHA256 verification failed. Installation was aborted.
update_download_failed_desc: Please try again later or download manually from the release page.
update_ready_desc:
Installer is ready: {0}

Click "Install now" to quit RhythmAlign and start the installer.
log_stream_copy: Enabled [Stream Copy]: Keeping original video quality, remuxing audio.
